items.prompt: What does the acronym "AVP" stand for? Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"answer": "<full name>"} and nothing else.
In the avp CLI, which scorer name grades ParseBench table-extraction fidelity? Respond with ONLY {"answer": "<scorer-name>"} and nothing else.
What HuggingFace dataset id does the avp ParseBench example use? Respond with ONLY {"answer": "<owner/name>"} and nothing else.
Which avp CLI command runs an eval config file and prints the ranked board? Respond with ONLY {"answer": "<command>"} — the command words only, no arguments, no backticks.
Which avp CLI command validates a Commission JSON file? Respond with ONLY {"answer": "<command>"} — the command words only, no file argument, no backticks.
In the avp CLI, which scorer checks that the answer text equals the expected value exactly? Respond with ONLY {"answer": "<scorer-name>"} and nothing else.
